summary: Tested /standard page (LaunchPath Standard enrollment gateway) at desktop 1280px and mobile 375px. All 6 sections render correctly, all CTAs link to /admission, navbar updated to /standard, responsive breakpoints working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: StandardPage at /standard is fully functional. All sections verified: hero with Playfair Display headline, two-column comparison, stat bar (10/72/17+/84), 10 module cards (LP-MOD-08 and LP-MOD-09 at 0.7 opacity with COMING COHORT 2 label), 5 checkpoint timeline with pulsing dots and LP-VRF REGISTRY note, two pricing cards (Single $2500 gold border + RECOMMENDED badge, Phased outlined), final CTA. All CTAs link to /admission. Mobile responsive: std-two-col, std-module-grid, std-finance-grid all collapse to single column at 375px.
